summary: Added a dependency-free TCP AV1 sample smoke harness in madobe-transport, exposed it as madobectl video-smoke send/receive, proved a localhost sender/receiver exchange without macOS hardware, and recorded deterministic logs, timelines, result, and command evidence. The harness explicitly does not claim QUIC, VideoToolbox decode, Metal render, presentation, or latency.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: A CLI or test helper can run as a sender using evidence/m2-nvenc-encode-sample/sample-av1.ivf.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: madobectl video-smoke send was run against evidence/m2-nvenc-encode-sample/sample-av1.ivf; see evidence/m3-lan-video-smoke-harness/sender-cli.out and sender.log.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: A CLI or test helper can run as a receiver and validate frame metadata, payload byte count, and payload SHA-256.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m3-lan-video-smoke-harness/receiver.log and result.json record metadata_valid=true, payload_byte_count_valid=true, payload_sha256_valid=true, payloadBytes=84, and the expected SHA-256.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: A localhost integration test proves the sender/receiver exchange without requiring macOS hardware.
Evidence records commands, sample hash, sender log, receiver log, and a result/timeline artifact.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: commands.log, sample-hash.txt, sender.log, receiver.log, sender-timeline.json, receiver-timeline.json, and result.json under evidence/m3-lan-video-smoke-harness/.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Docs explain the harness is not QUIC, not VideoToolbox decode, not Metal render, not presentation, and not latency proof.

commandsRun.command: qd migrate; qd method acknowledge --agent codex-m3-lan-video-smoke-harness; qd sync --from roadmap/qd-export.json; qd node show m3-lan-video-smoke-harness --full

commandsRun.evidence: CLI binary built before localhost smoke; see commands.log.
Sandboxed attempt failed with Operation not permitted; escalated rerun passed. See sender-cli.out, receiver-cli.out, sender.log, receiver.log, and result.json.

realWorldValidation.evidence: A local TCP sender/receiver smoke passed on 127.0.0.1:47031. No Mac hardware, product QUIC, VideoToolbox decode, Metal render, presentation, or latency validation was required or claimed by this node.
